nasb.text: the bronze altar and its bronze grating, its poles and all its utensils, the laver and its stand;

esv.text: the bronze altar, and its grating of bronze, its poles, and all its utensils; the basin and its stand;

cnv.text: 銅壇、壇上的銅網、壇槓、壇上的一切器具、洗濯盆和盆座；

ccb.text: 铜祭坛、祭坛的铜网、抬祭坛的横杠、祭坛用的一切器具、洗濯盆和盆座；
